calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jun-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Civil Harassment OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Diana Chen, CSR #11312 Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Thomas Drohan, Esq., and Dwana Bain, Esq. for and with Petitioner: Billie Webb, who was present.

Jonathan Bornstein for Mercy Housing, was also present.

No appearance by the Respondent: Travis Emert.

The Petitioner was sworn.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 50 yards away from the following protected person: Billie Webb and her residence, the entire property at 333 Baker Street, San Francisco, CA., including 1509 Hayes Street, 1599 Hayes Street, and 1555 Hayes Street in San Francisco, CA.

Respondent must not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements.

Expires June 2, 2013

Order signed in open court.
